component: CA Indicator Search/Filter Component - UI Form Controls
suggestion: ['Developer: Refactor the current text input field to a searchable select/dropdown component (e.g., using a library like react-select, ant-design Select with showSearch, or similar). Implement debounced search functionality, populate options from the existing indicator data source, and ensure proper keyboard navigation and accessibility support.', 'QA/Agent: Verify that the searchable select component displays filtered options as the user types, supports selection via mouse click and keyboard (Enter/Arrow keys), handles edge cases like empty results gracefully, and maintains consistent behavior across supported browsers.']
title: CA Indicator Search Field Needs to be Converted to Searchable Select Dropdown for Improved User Experience

component: Authentication/Authorization Module - Review Details Page Access Control
suggestion: ["Developer: Investigate the access control logic for the review details page. Check if the user's permissions and roles are being properly validated against the page's access requirements. Review the authorization middleware/guards, verify token validation, and ensure proper role-based access control (RBAC) is implemented. Also check for any recent permission policy changes that may have inadvertently restricted access.", 'QA/Agent: Verify the issue across different user roles and permission levels. Document the exact user credentials, roles, and steps to reproduce. Check if the issue is consistent or intermittent, and confirm whether it affects all users or specific user groups. Test in different browsers and environments to rule out session/cache issues.']
title: Users Unable to Access Review Details Page Due to Authorization Failure

suggestion: ['Developer: Implement input validation on the product code search field to restrict invalid characters, enforce proper format patterns (alphanumeric, length limits), and display user-friendly error messages when invalid values are entered. title: Product Code Search Returns Unexpected Results When Invalid/Malformed Values Are Entered
